check-docs.description: Verify AGENTS.md covers all changes in this session
check-docs.prompt: Run: git diff --name-only HEAD~1. For each source file (.ts, .tsx, .js, .css) that changed, check if it is mentioned in AGENTS.md under the correct section (Dizin Yapısı, Komutlar, Mimari, etc.). Report any files not documented in AGENTS.md. If AGENTS.md itself is in the diff, note that it was updated. If source files changed but AGENTS.md was NOT updated, flag this as a violation and suggest specific sections to add.
